name: Wikipedia Current Events
extraction_prompt: Look at the main content area for the current date. Extract the top 3 news bullet points. Read the actual visible page content. Do not include sidebar text or navigation links.

name: Hacker News
extraction_prompt: Extract the top 3 article headlines and the number of points they currently have. Ignore job postings or navigational text.

name: BBC Weather London
extraction_prompt: Extract today's weather for London, including current conditions, high/low temperature, and any notable alerts. Read the actual visible page content before answering.
